task_completion.description: Verify a Payment Entry (Receive) was created for 'Global Energy' for $10,000.

task_completion.description: Verify the Payment Entry was submitted.

task_completion.description: Verify a Sales Invoice was created for 'Global Energy' with the item 'Consulting Services' at a rate of $25,000.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a Sales Invoice form with Customer 'Global Energy', an item row for 'Consulting Services', and a Rate or Amount of '25,000'.

task_completion.description: Verify the $10,000 advance payment was allocated to the Sales Invoice.

task_completion.description: Verify the Sales Invoice was submitted and shows an outstanding balance of $15,000.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Sales Invoice showing a 'Submitted' or 'Unpaid' status (not 'Draft'), a Grand Total of '25,000', and an Outstanding Amount of exactly '15,000'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the ERPNext web interface rather than using API calls or terminal scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ERPNext web interface in a browser, with visible navigation, form filling, and button clicks.

integrity.description: The agent actually created the records in the system rather than mocking the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The ERPNext interface shows standard system notifications (e.g., 'Saved', 'Submitted') and system-generated document IDs in the header (e.g., ACC-PAY-..., SINV-...).

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final state.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are open in the screenshots, and the UI styling is consistent with standard ERPNext.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Customer: 'Global Energy'. Item: 'Consulting Services'. Advance Payment Amount: $10,000. Sales Invoice Rate/Total: $25,000. Expected Final Outstanding Balance on Invoice: $15,000.
